principles: Only download active workbooks from controlled library
Use desktop Excel to open active workbooks
Trusted locations, if used, are IT-managed only
Trusted publishers are used only for approved signed macro projects
Users must not trust ad-hoc files or uncontrolled folders
required_user_controls: default app for .xlsx is Microsoft Excel desktop
download folder is known and controlled
record save path follows department rule
do not re-publish renamed local copies as official forms
